evidence_excerpt: 15 months after rituximab therapy, the patient was in complete remission with normal liver function tests under lamivudine treatment; Table shows 13 months/NED for the present case.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: All lesions disappeared after 6 weekly cycles; patient remained in complete remission at 15 months.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: After 4 weeks, two lesions disappeared and the others were partially regressed (≥50% reduction).
Complete response for all lesions after 6 weekly cycles of rituximab.
15 months after rituximab therapy, the patient was in complete remission with normal liver function tests; Table lists 13 months/NED.

notes_on_uncertainty: Follow-up duration is reported as both 13 months (table) and 15 months (text), but both indicate no evidence of disease. Functional status is not explicitly described; categorized as none based on sustained complete remission and absence of reported symptoms. Index time approximated to diagnosis date before initiation of lamivudine and rituximab.
